# This file was generated by
# scripts/copy_from_upstream/copy_from_upstream.py

set(_HQC_OBJS "")

if(OQS_ENABLE_KEM_hqc_128)
    add_library(hqc_128_ref OBJECT kem_hqc_128.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/gf.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/gf2x.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/hqc.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/parsing.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/reed_muller.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/reed_solomon.c xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref/vector.c)
    target_compile_options(hqc_128_ref PUBLIC -DHQC_ARCH_REF=1)
    target_include_directories(hqc_128_ref PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/xuganyu96-hqc_hqc-128_ref)
    target_include_directories(hqc_128_ref PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/common/pqclean_shims)
    target_compile_options(hqc_128_ref PUBLIC -DHQC_ARCH_REF=1)
    set(_HQC_OBJS ${_HQC_OBJS} $<TARGET_OBJECTS:hqc_128_ref>)
endif()

set(HQC_OBJS ${_HQC_OBJS} PARENT_SCOPE)
